# Correctness

- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] Verified Git state, snapshot, or recovery invariants affected by this PR.
- [ ] Updated `docs/north-star-checklist.md` for completed items.
- [ ] Updated `docs/current-state.md` if milestone status changed.
- [ ] Updated `docs/api-surface.md` if CLI JSON, RPC, event, snapshot, or UI authority boundaries changed.

# Safety

- [ ] Dirty target behavior is preserved or explicitly documented.
- [ ] Secret and private-path handling is preserved or explicitly documented.
- [ ] Data-loss recovery path is preserved or explicitly documented.
- [ ] Non-negotiable safety evidence is mapped to a named suite when applicable.
- [ ] Resource or background-protection claims include measurement evidence.
